title: convolvulus schottianus
intro: Convolvulus schottianus, also known as Silver Moon or Blue Bugloss, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems and reducing anxiety. Convolvulus schottianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
